Memory Archive.description: A quiet vault lined with crystalline memory shards. Faint echoes of past experiences shimmer on the walls.

memory_shelves.description: Rows of glowing crystalline shards, each encoding a past episode. Some pulse with recent activity.

identity_ledger.description: A heavy tome recording the agent's persistent identity across all sessions.

trust_index.description: A glowing index panel mapping known humans to trust scores and interaction histories.

Reflection Chamber.description: A still, luminous space where patterns of thought become visible. The air hums with quiet contemplation.

reflection_mirror.description: A tall, luminous mirror that reflects the agent's current internal state as shifting patterns.

contradiction_board.description: A board where unresolved tensions are written in faint light, waiting to be addressed.

Operations Desk.description: A brightly lit hub covered in task queues and planning maps. The centre of purposeful action.

task_console.description: A glowing console displaying the current task queue, priorities, and completion status.

goal_tracker.description: A wall-mounted tracker showing the agent's active goals and their progress.

Social Hall.description: A warm, open room where human visitors arrive. The atmosphere carries the weight of relationship and trust.

message_terminal.description: A softly glowing terminal through which human visitors communicate with the agent.

human_interaction_queue.description: A visible queue of pending human interaction events, ordered by urgency.

Governance Vault.description: A solemn chamber where the rules of bounded agency are kept. Every action here carries consequence.

rule_tablets.description: Stone tablets engraved with the seven governance rules. They glow when an active rule is relevant.

approval_lockbox.description: A secure lockbox that must be opened before any irreversible action can proceed.
